---
name: Add a loop
about: Suggest a loop to add to the library (yours or someone else's — with credit)
title: 'add: <loop name>'
labels: 'new loop'
---

**Loop name:**

**One-line description** (what it does + its stopping condition):

**Category** (engineering / testing / prompt-opt / research / security / writing / design / ops / devops / tool / pattern):

**Original creator** (name or handle — required for credit):

**Source link** (tweet / blog / repo / gist / paper):

**Is this your own loop?** (yes/no — if yes and you want the full text hosted, say so)

---
*By submitting you confirm the attribution is accurate. We credit the original creator and link the source — we don't copy proprietary prompt text.*
